signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.16% YoY | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.16% in March 2026 from 2.00% in February 2026, with monthly inflation at 0.34% and CPI at 118.8; this exceeds the Bank of Korea's 2% target amid rising oil prices.[1]
